attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
,'N'LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,'N' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG          
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM
(
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT AS OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT ,
OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_EXTENDED_QTY) AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,            
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE MT
WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'O_ADJ' AND LATEST_DR_BKG_FLG='Y' AND DV_LATEST_SC_FLG='Y' AND MANUAL_TRX_KEY >0 
AND EXISTS 
( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_MNL_INCR  OD  
WHERE
MT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY = OD.MANUAL_TRX_KEY  AND MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD=OD.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD)  
) A

SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT  
,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  /*xaas*/
,'Y'LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG         
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM
(
SELECT 
 ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,NAOVRLY.SCASA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
,ELOVRLY.BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,ELOVRLY.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
,ELOVRLY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
,NAOVRLY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,NAOVRLY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
,NAOVRLY.SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
,CAST((NAOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*ELOVRLY.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
,ELOVRLY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ELOVRLY.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            
,ELOVRLY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,ELOVRLY.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_DATA_MNL_INCR NAOVRLY 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_O_ADJ_LATEST FWD
ON 
NAOVRLY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=FWD.MANUAL_TRX_KEY 
AND FWD.DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_DIRECT_DATA_MNL_O_INCR ELOVRLY
ON FWD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  = ELOVRLY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
AND ELOVRLY.BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='O_ADJ'
WHERE  NAOVRLY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY >0  AND NAOVRLY.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 ) A
